slice.name: Create Brief from Link
slice.additiveBaselineNote: This slice is an additive extension of the locked canonical MVP flow. The existing source-text create -> create brief -> share -> review path remains intact; link input adds a parallel create entry path that converges into the same downstream brief workflow.

currentStatus.summary: Prototype coverage for Create Brief from Link is now documented as the current source of truth for leadership review and implementation planning.
evidence: Canonical proto-flow updated with additive link-input path
Success and error states defined for input validation and generation outcomes
User-visible acceptance criteria captured for prototype parity
nextFocus: Frontend prototype/UI alignment to documented states
Implementation of loading, failure, and saved-brief transitions
Verification that saved brief detail matches review output and share path

primaryPath: Create screen: choose link input mode and enter URL
Loading/generation state: submit URL and process source content
Generated brief review/edit: inspect and optionally refine generated brief
Saved brief detail: land on persistent brief view ready for sharing
alternateStates: Invalid URL blocks generation and shows inline feedback
Generation failure shows recoverable error with retry/return path

screenCoverage.label: Create Brief Input
screenCoverage.purpose: Collect a source URL through the additive link-input path.

screenCoverage.label: Generation Loading
screenCoverage.purpose: Communicate that the system is retrieving and transforming link content into a brief.

screenCoverage.label: Generated Brief Review/Edit
screenCoverage.purpose: Show the generated brief in a user-reviewable form before final save/share actions.

screenCoverage.label: Saved Brief Detail
screenCoverage.purpose: Present the persisted brief as the share-ready post-generation destination.

screenCoverage.label: Invalid URL
screenCoverage.purpose: Handle malformed, empty, or unacceptable link input before processing starts.

screenCoverage.label: Generation Failure
screenCoverage.purpose: Handle accepted links that cannot be fetched, parsed, or converted into a usable brief.

acceptanceCriteria.text: The prototype clearly shows a link-input entry path from the create screen, including URL entry and validation behavior.
The live dashboard representation matches the canonical proto flow by showing the additive link path without replacing the locked source-text baseline.
Loading/generation is represented as a distinct user-visible state between link submission and brief review.
Generated brief review/edit is represented as a separate state from saved brief detail so draft inspection and persistent output are not conflated.
Saved brief detail is included as a downstream destination after successful generation and review, with sharing still available.
Invalid URL is represented as a pre-submit error state that blocks generation and gives correction feedback.
Generation failure is represented as a post-submit error state distinct from invalid URL, with clear retry or return options.
All documented user-visible states in the proto slice are present in this dashboard view: input, loading, generated brief review/edit, saved brief detail, invalid URL, and generation failure.

risks: Saved brief detail is documented here as a required downstream state and should be validated against future frontend implementation.
Review and share ordering may differ in existing baseline language; implementation should preserve additive slice intent while keeping state transitions explicit.
